user.title: Add Scene Flipper
user.description: Create a new scene flipper that toggles between two scenes.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this scene flipper (e.g., 'Living Room Lights').
data_description.scene_a: The scene to use for slot A (the initial 'on' scene).
data_description.scene_b: The scene to use for slot B (the initial 'off' scene).

abort.already_configured: This scene flipper is already configured.

data_description.scene_a: The scene to use for slot A.
data_description.scene_b: The scene to use for slot B.
data_description.flip_list_a: Scenes to cycle through with flip_next/flip_prev when slot A is active. Leave empty to disable flipping for slot A.
data_description.flip_list_b: Scenes to cycle through with flip_next/flip_prev when slot B is active. Leave empty to disable flipping for slot B.
